assertions.title: Trait-enabled generated Go remains formatter-stable and vet-clean

steps.action: Compile the dedicated `.rg` fixture with the `rgoc` CLI.
steps.expected: Compilation succeeds and writes a Go file to the requested output path.
steps.observed: `nix develop --quiet -c dune exec rgoc -- … -o …` exited 0 and created `phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-negatives-and-acceptance/trait-go-cleanliness.go`.

steps.action: Inspect the generated Go artifact for the trait-heavy lowering relevant to the assertion.
steps.expected: Generated Go contains the expected trait/generic lowering markers for the compiled fixture.
steps.observed: 5: type Stringify interface {; 17: func stringify_it[T Stringify](w T) string {; 13: func (self Wrapper) To_str() string {

steps.action: Run downstream Go validation on the generated artifact.
steps.expected: `gofmt -d`, `go build`, `go vet`, and `go run` succeed; runtime output matches the fixture expectation.
steps.observed: `gofmt -d`, `go build -o /dev/null`, `go vet`, and `go run` all exited 0; after stripping the flake-shell banner there was no `gofmt` diff and normalized runtime stdout was `wrapped`.

  ocaml: 5.4.1
  dune:  3.21.1
  opam:  2.5.0
rgoc v0.0.1

assertions.title: Final MVP acceptance program compiles and runs as one integrated flow

steps.action: Compile the dedicated `.rg` fixture with the `rgoc` CLI.
steps.expected: Compilation succeeds and writes a Go file to the requested output path.
steps.observed: `nix develop --quiet -c dune exec rgoc -- … -o …` exited 0 and created `phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-negatives-and-acceptance/final-mvp-acceptance.go`.

steps.action: Inspect the generated Go artifact for the trait-heavy lowering relevant to the assertion.
steps.expected: Generated Go contains the expected trait/generic lowering markers for the compiled fixture.
steps.observed: 8: type Describe interface {; 12: type Task struct {; 33: type Priority interface {; 78: func print_desc[T Describe](item T) {; 82: func find_task(tasks []string, target string) *string {; 127: 	scores := make(map[string]int64)

steps.action: Run downstream Go validation on the generated artifact.
steps.expected: `gofmt -d`, `go build`, `go vet`, and `go run` succeed; runtime output matches the fixture expectation.
steps.observed: `gofmt -d`, `go build -o /dev/null`, `go vet`, and `go run` all exited 0; after stripping the flake-shell banner there was no `gofmt` diff and normalized runtime stdout matched the expected acceptance output.

  ocaml: 5.4.1
  dune:  3.21.1
  opam:  2.5.0
rgoc v0.0.1

  dune:  3.21.1
  opam:  2.5.0

frictions.description: `nix develop --quiet -c ...` prepends the flake-shell banner on stdout and a dirty-tree warning on stderr, so raw outputs include environment noise unrelated to the compiler or Go tool results.
frictions.resolution: Kept full command transcripts in `*.log`, normalized `*.stdout` files to trailing program output, and treated `gofmt` as clean when the only stdout content was the flake-shell banner.

summary: Tested 7 assigned CLI assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Trait-negative compiler diagnostics and the trait-heavy acceptance flows were exercised through `rgoc` plus downstream Go tooling in the Nix flake environment.
